chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.105 of 2023 Muhammad Shoaib Versus Aqil Abbas & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 5922/23 2. For orders on CMA 5638/23 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA 5639/23 Dated: 21.12.2023 Mr. Qamar Riaz Virk for appellant. -.-.- Learned counsel, after arguing the instant appeal at some length, concedes the observations of the Court as to its maintainability and submits that he would not press this appeal, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Judge Judge
